findings.title: A web-cited technical finding
findings.summary: A finding backed by a public web source, used to exercise the http(s) citation path of the sigint->MIF converter.

falsification_attempts.reason: Re-fetched the primary source; the asserted text is present verbatim.

findings.title: An internal-source technical finding
findings.summary: A finding backed only by an internal document (no web URL), used to exercise the internal:document citation path gated by features.internalCitations.
evidence: ADR-0001: 'Promote by immutable digest; the digest is the only source of truth.'
